title: Drishti Eye Care is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Drishti Eye Care is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!
